title: Audit Log Entry
description: Security-relevant event recorded in the Life Engine Core audit log. Entries are retained for 90 days and encrypted at rest within the SQLCipher database.

timestamp.description: When the event occurred, in RFC 3339 format.

plugin_id.description: The plugin associated with this event, if any. Null for system-level events.

details.description: Structured JSON details about the event. Content varies by event_type.

created_at.description: Row creation timestamp in RFC 3339 format.
